metadata.title: Talent Acquisition | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered talent acquisition platform for all your recruitment operations — from job posting and candidate tracking to interview scheduling and document management.

hero.title: ⭐ Talent Acquisition
hero.description: AdonERP is a dedicated solution for talent acquisition, supporting every step from building job pages to managing candidates and hiring.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP saved us plenty of web development time, allowing us to focus on individual strengths which is immensely helpful for start-ups.

pipelineSection.title: From your website to your
pipelineSection.description: Smart contact forms turn website visitors into applicants and push their information directly into your recruitment pipeline.

talentSection.title: Efficiently manage your
talentSection.description: Track applications, candidates and documents in one place so your team can evaluate the right people faster.

workflowSection.title: Tailor-made pipeline to
workflowSection.subtitle: fit your workflow
workflowSection.description: Candidates progress automatically through recruitment stages, while your team keeps full control of every step.

schedulingSection.title: Less scheduling, more
schedulingSection.description: Send interview links, sync calendars, and let candidates pick suitable interview slots without manual scheduling.

documentsSection.title: Never lose track of another document

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Tools to streamline hiring, job pages, candidate tracking, interviews, documents and communication.

list.title: Stay on target
list.description: Track recruitment metrics and hiring goals in real-time.

list.title: Personalized website
list.description: Create custom career pages that reflect your employer brand.

list.title: Mobile friendly
list.description: Candidates can apply from any device, anywhere.

list.title: Make the most of your time
list.description: Automate repetitive tasks and focus on interviewing.

list.title: Professional communication
list.description: Send automated updates and personalized messages to candidates.

list.title: Automated data importing
list.description: Import candidate data from job boards and career sites automatically.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your recruitment process, candidate management, and HR operations.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: AdonERP saved us plenty of web development time, allowing us to focus on individual strengths which is immensely helpful for start-ups.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: The automated pipeline and interview scheduling transformed our hiring process. We reduced time-to-hire by 60%.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for talent acquisition and recruitment.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a talent acquisition workflow that helps you attract top talent, streamline interviews, and build your dream team.
